name: Puffco PEAK Pro 3D Chamber
summary: The Puffco PEAK Pro 3D Chamber utilizes heating technology, featuring heating tracers integrated into the ceramic bowl.
description: The Puffco PEAK Pro 3D Chamber utilizes heating technology, featuring heating tracers integrated into the ceramic bowl. This unique design allows for vaporisation on the side walls rather than the bottom, preserving the quality of the oil and delivering a consistently smooth hit with enhanced flavour. A necessary addition for oil enthusiasts wanting to fully optimise their experience. *Please Note: Never attempt to disassemble the chamber, this will break it. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
